sources.expression: $wpdb->get_results("SELECT c.comment_ID, c.comment_post_ID, c.comment_author, c.comment_author_email, c.comment_author_url, c.comment_author_IP, c.comment_date, c.comment_content, c.comment_approved, c.comment_parent, p.post_title, p.post_type, p.guid FROM ".$sql_query." ORDER BY c.comment_date DESC LIMIT 500")
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT link_id, link_url, link_name, link_target, link_visible, link_rating, link_rel FROM ".$sql_query." ORDER BY link_name ASC LIMIT 500")

$wpdb->get_results("SELECT l.link_id, $wpdb->terms.name
FROM $wpdb->links AS l
INNER JOIN $wpdb->term_relationships ON ( l.link_id = $wpdb->term_relationships.object_id )
INNER JOIN $wpdb->term_taxonomy ON ( $wpdb->term_relationships.term_taxonomy_id = $wpdb->term_taxonomy.term_taxonomy_id
AND $wpdb->term_taxonomy.taxonomy = '".$taxonomy."' )
INNER JOIN $wpdb->terms ON ( $wpdb->term_taxonomy.term_id = $wpdb->terms.term_id )")

$wpdb->get_results("SELECT p.ID AS post_id, $wpdb->terms.name
FROM $wpdb->posts AS p
INNER JOIN $wpdb->term_relationships ON ( p.ID = $wpdb->term_relationships.object_id )
INNER JOIN $wpdb->term_taxonomy ON ( $wpdb->term_relationships.term_taxonomy_id = $wpdb->term_taxonomy.term_taxonomy_id
AND $wpdb->term_taxonomy.taxonomy = '".$taxonomy."' )
INNER JOIN $wpdb->terms ON ( $wpdb->term_taxonomy.term_id = $wpdb->terms.term_id )")
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT ID as user_id, display_name FROM $wpdb->users WHERE user_status=0")
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT option_name, option_value FROM $wpdb->options WHERE option_name LIKE 'IWP_jobdata_%'", ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_results("
			SELECT option_id
				FROM $wpdb->options
				WHERE option_name IN ('IWP_locked_$semaphore', 'IWP_unlocked_$semaphore', 'IWP_last_lock_time_$semaphore', 'IWP_semaphore_$semaphore')
		")
$wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM ".$table_name." WHERE historyID = %d ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1", $ID), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT ID, taskName, taskResults, requestParams FROM ".$table_name." ORDER BY ID DESC",  ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM ".$table_name." WHERE historyID = %d ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1", $ID), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_var( "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM " . $wpdb->base_prefix . $this_table_name . " WHERE thisFileHeader IS NOT NULL")
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT ID, taskName, taskResults, requestParams FROM ".$table_name." ORDER BY ID DESC",  ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT ID, taskName, taskResults FROM ".$table_name." ORDER BY ID DESC",  ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM ".$table_name." WHERE historyID = %d ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1", $ID), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT ID, taskName, taskResults, requestParams FROM ".$table_name." ORDER BY ID DESC",  ARRAY_A)
$wpdb -> get_col($wpdb->prepare("SELECT redirectLink FROM ".$wpdb->base_prefix."iwp_redirects WHERE oldLink = %s LIMIT 1",$current_url))

file_put_contents($iwp_backup_dir.'/binziptest/subdir1/subdir2/test2.html', 'InfiniteWP is a really great backup and restoration plugin for WordPress.')

$wpdb->get_results("
			SELECT option_id
				FROM $wpdb->options
				WHERE option_name IN ('IWP_locked_$semaphore', 'IWP_unlocked_$semaphore', 'IWP_last_lock_time_$semaphore', 'IWP_semaphore_$semaphore')
		")

$wpdb->query($wpdb->prepare("
				INSERT INTO $wpdb->options (option_name, option_value, autoload)
				VALUES
				('IWP_unlocked_$semaphore', '1', 'no'),
				('IWP_last_lock_time_$semaphore', '%s', 'no'),
				('IWP_semaphore_$semaphore', '0', 'no')
			", current_time('mysql', 1)))
$wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM ".$table_name." WHERE historyID = %d ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1", $ID), ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->query("
			UPDATE $wpdb->options
			   SET option_value = CAST(option_value AS UNSIGNED) + 1
			 WHERE option_name = 'IWP_semaphore_".$this->lock_name."'
			   AND option_value = '0'
		")

$wpdb->query($wpdb->prepare("
			UPDATE $wpdb->options
			   SET option_value = %s
			 WHERE option_name = 'IWP_last_lock_time_".$this->lock_name."'
		", current_time('mysql', 1)))

$wpdb->query("
				UPDATE $wpdb->options
				   SET option_value = CAST(option_value AS UNSIGNED) + 1
				 WHERE option_name = 'IWP_semaphore_".$this->lock_name."'
			")

$wpdb->query("
			UPDATE $wpdb->options
			   SET option_value = CAST(option_value AS UNSIGNED) - 1
			 WHERE option_name = 'IWP_semaphore_".$this->lock_name."'
			   AND CAST(option_value AS UNSIGNED) > 0
		")

$wpdb->query($wpdb->prepare("
			UPDATE $wpdb->options
			   SET option_value = %s
			 WHERE option_name = 'IWP_last_lock_time_".$this->lock_name."'
			   AND option_value <= %s
		", $current_time, $three_minutes_before))

$wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM ".$table_name." WHERE historyID = %d ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1", $ID), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_var( "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM " . $wpdb->base_prefix . $this_table_name . " WHERE thisFileHeader IS NOT NULL")

                    $loopback_url,
                    array(
                            'method' => 'GET',
                            'timeout' => 8, // X second delay. A loopback should be very fast.
                            'redirection' => 5,
                            'httpversion' => '1.0',
                            'blocking' => true,
                            'headers' => array(),
                            'body' => null,
                            'cookies' => array()
                    )
            )
